title: potentilla divina
intro: Potentilla divina, also known as the divine cinquefoil, is a flowering plant species in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Potentilla divina include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing skin irritations, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting wound healing. Potentilla divina can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
